n: Instance: The Lesson of the Flames

steps.t: You have come with Jajax, Rothog, and Belondor to destroy the Narghâk weapons used by the Song.
If you tamper with the Narghâk weapons aboard the Ordâkhai ship Kosagháti, you should be able to prevent their further use.
Something has happened to the Orc-ship Grishúlvosh. Jajax demands your attention.
Rothog grieves beside his fallen comrade.
